summary: Pricing + Demo + Signup Sales Surfaces Testing Complete. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend UI and navigation tests passed. Verified: (1) GET /api/onboarding/plans returns catalog with trial is_public=false, (2) Starter/Pro/Enterprise have correct prices ₺990/₺2490/₺6990 and are public, (3) POST /api/onboarding/signup creates trial with 14-day trial_end, (4) Pricing page shows Starter/Pro/Enterprise cards with '14 Gün Ücretsiz Dene' CTAs, (5) Demo page has warm sales copy with 'Demo Hesap Oluştur' and 'Hemen Başla' CTAs, (6) Signup page shows trial messaging + selectable paid-plan preference cards, (7) Navigation flow /pricing → /demo → /signup works correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/onboarding/plans returns 200
✅ Backend: Plans response contains 4 plans (trial, starter, pro, enterprise)
✅ Backend: Trial plan has is_public=false (hidden from public pricing)
✅ Backend: Starter plan has is_public=true
✅ Backend: Pro plan has is_public=true
✅ Backend: Enterprise plan has is_public=true
✅ Backend: Starter pricing ₺990/month TRY
✅ Backend: Pro pricing ₺2,490/month TRY
✅ Backend: Enterprise pricing ₺6,990/month TRY
✅ Backend: Pro plan is marked as 'popular' (is_popular=true)
✅ Backend: Starter limits - 100 reservations/month, 3 users
✅ Backend: Pro limits - 500 reservations/month, 10 users
✅ Backend: Enterprise limits - unlimited (null)
✅ Backend: Trial limits - 100 reservations, 2 users (revised spec)
✅ Backend: POST /api/onboarding/signup creates trial plan
✅ Backend: Signup returns 14-day trial_end
✅ Backend: Signup returns access_token for auto-login
✅ Backend: Signup returns org_id, tenant_id, user_id
✅ Backend: Duplicate email returns 409 Conflict
✅ Backend: Plan ordering - trial→starter→pro→enterprise
✅ Frontend: Pricing page loads with data-testid='pricing-page'
✅ Frontend: Pricing title 'Acentenizi Excel'den kurtarın'
✅ Frontend: Hero CTA text '14 Gün Ücretsiz Dene'
✅ Frontend: Trial card mentions 14 days, 100 reservations, 2 users
✅ Frontend: Starter card shows ₺990/ay
✅ Frontend: Pro card shows ₺2.490/ay with 'EN POPÜLER' badge
✅ Frontend: Enterprise card shows ₺6.990/ay
✅ Frontend: All plan CTAs show '14 Gün Ücretsiz Dene'
✅ Frontend: Demo page loads with data-testid='demo-page'
✅ Frontend: Demo hero title 'Acentelerde Excel dönemi bitiyor'
✅ Frontend: Demo primary CTA 'Demo Hesap Oluştur' → /signup
✅ Frontend: Demo funnel CTA 'Hemen Başla' → /signup (action-driven)
✅ Frontend: Demo hero badge mentions 14 GÜN ÜCRETSIZ
✅ Frontend: Signup page loads with data-testid='signup-page'
✅ Frontend: Signup title '14 gün ücretsiz deneyin, sonra karar verin'
✅ Frontend: Signup sidebar shows trial messaging (14 days, 100 reservations, 2 users)
✅ Frontend: Signup form inputs present (company, name, email, password)
✅ Frontend: Signup plan picker shows Starter ₺990, Pro ₺2.490, Enterprise ₺6.990
✅ Frontend: Signup submit button 'Hemen Başla' (action-driven CTA)
✅ Frontend: Navigation /pricing → /demo works
✅ Frontend: Navigation /demo → /signup works
✅ Frontend: Homepage has 'Fiyatlar' and 'Demo' links in nav
critical_code_review_comments: plan_matrix.py: Correct pricing - Starter ₺990, Pro ₺2,490, Enterprise ₺6,990
plan_matrix.py: Trial has is_public=False (hidden from public), paid plans have is_public=True
plan_matrix.py: Trial limits correctly set to 100 reservations, 2 users (revised spec)
onboarding_service.py: signup() creates trial subscription with 14-day trial_end
PricingPage.jsx: PAID_PLAN_ORDER filters to only show starter/pro/enterprise (trial hidden)
PricingPage.jsx: All CTAs correctly use '14 Gün Ücretsiz Dene' text
DemoPage.jsx: Warm sales copy with 'Demo Hesap Oluştur' and 'Hemen Başla' CTAs
SignupPage.jsx: Trial messaging present + paid plan preference picker
seed_data_creation: Signup tests create unique test users with random emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing + Demo + Signup public sales surfaces fully verified. All plans correctly priced and displayed. Trial is hidden from public pricing (is_public=false) but signup still creates trial. CTAs follow warm/sales-oriented tone: '14 Gün Ücretsiz Dene', 'Demo Hesap Oluştur', 'Hemen Başla'. Navigation flow /pricing → /demo → /signup works. No mocked APIs.
